Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Jyrine Tessella Marten]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — Jyrine Tessella Marten is Calder's wife.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Jyrine Tessella Marten has script tattooed on the back of her hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Jyrine is someone whose fate Calder wants to find out about.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Jyrine Tessella is the daughter of a Watchman who died in the line of duty.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Jyrine leaned forward scenting weakness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — It is unknown if Jyrine is dead or alive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — Jyrine was caught by Alsa Grayweather.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — Jyrine was waiting for Calder in the hall outside his room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Jyrine Tessella Marten is a prisoner in a cell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Jyrine is a character who is not a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 10''' — Jyrine is a person Calder recounts his story to in the Grayweather library.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 10''' — Jyrine's family calls her Jerri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Jyrine has been killed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 13''' — Jyrine's mother once worked in an Imperial Prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 13''' — Jyrine is a character who can sense detectors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Shera said Jyrine had been killed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — Jyrine is a person Bliss hopes will survive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — The crew seeks to settle what happened to Jyrine.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — Jyrine is planning a clandestine operation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Jerri's name is Jyrine Tessella.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Calder wonders if Jyrine has obtained weapons-grade alchemy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Jyrine is with Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Jyrine Tessella Marten sits in a cell near Lucan and holds a blighted circle of darkness.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Jyrine Tessella Marten is a Soulbound who can manipulate green flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Jyrine Tessella Marten was placed in a prison cell next to Lucan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Shera has a memory of plunging a knife into Jyrine Tessella Marten's throat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — The Sleepless told Jyrine to call for help when she feels the Heart's power increase.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Jyrine is a woman who was cowering in terror against the back of her cell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Jyrine wears a bracelet with an Elder symbol.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Jyrine is in a cell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Jyrine is in a cage near Lucan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Jyrine is in a cell next to Lucan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Jyrine is a Sleepless and a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Jyrine is being held in a cell separated from Lucan by a wall.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 1''' — Jyrine is the daughter of a man present in the temple room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 1''' — Jyrine is also referred to as Jerri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 1''' — Jyrine's father is present in the temple room and is described as being ecstatic about a rising jewel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 1''' — Jyrine's father believes she will be very important someday.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — Jyrine Tessella whispered her secrets into the fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Jyrine Tessella Marten is the full name of Jerri.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Jyrine is Calder's former wife.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 3''' — Jyrine is a young woman with emerald earrings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 3''' — Jyrine is the youngest and shortest person in a group of four men.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 3''' — Jyrine was at the back of an alley with two men.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 3''' — Jyrine is associated with a ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 3''' — Jyrine is Petal's sister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Jyrine is the one interrogating Meia.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Jyrine Tessella Marten is a prisoner being interrogated by Meia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Jyrine wears a crimson prisoner’s suit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Jyrine's father sacrificed his career and life because he believed the Elders were the path to a better world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Jyrine Tessella Marten escaped from her cell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Jyrine Marten has died or disappeared.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Jyrine Tessella Marten was scheduled for interrogation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Jyrine responded to Calder with a thin stream of green fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Kelarac hovered over the deck in Jyrine Tessella Marten’s flesh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Jyrine Marten is the possessed individual Kelarac is using.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Jyrine dissolved in a pillar of green light.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
